dict.string: PermPilot's sample app uses the camera to demonstrate the Camera permission row.
PermPilot's sample app uses the microphone to demonstrate the Microphone permission row.
PermPilot's sample app requests location while in use to demonstrate the LocationWhileInUse permission row.
PermPilot's sample app requests background location to demonstrate the LocationAlways permission row.
PermPilot's sample app reads contacts to demonstrate the Contacts/WriteContacts permission rows.
PermPilot's sample app reads calendar events to demonstrate the Calendar permission row.
PermPilot's sample app reads the photo library to demonstrate the PhotoLibrary permission row.
PermPilot's sample app scans for Bluetooth devices to demonstrate the BluetoothScan permission row.
PermPilot's sample app reads motion/activity data to demonstrate the ActivityRecognition permission row.
PermPilot's sample app requests tracking authorization to demonstrate the AppTrackingTransparency permission row.
PermPilot's sample app uses speech recognition to demonstrate the SpeechRecognition permission row.
PermPilot's sample app reads reminders to demonstrate the Reminders permission row.
PermPilot's sample app reads the Apple Music library to demonstrate the AudioFiles permission row.
